# Product Truth Adaptation

The agent should not invent product facts. It should adapt product truth to buyer states.

## Product truth fields

```text
Product:
Target buyer:
Pain solved:
Mechanism:
Supported integrations:
Limitations:
Proof assets:
Pricing:
Onboarding steps:
Security/privacy notes:
Competitive differences:
```

Allowed transformations: simplify, reframe, compare, sequence, tailor by role, turn into demo script, turn into FAQ, turn into ad variants.

The agent should be bold in angles and conservative in facts.
